text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot a dejected-looking Special Week
worrying about her running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm not sure what to do.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I run, I feel like I can't quite
get it right.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Perhaps it's time for a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But how I supposed to do that?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If running has got you worried, then you should
do something unrelated.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Maybe swimming, for example.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Swimming, huh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Why not put on your favorite swimsuit and
go for a swim?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You see, a costume is much like a switch that can
alter your mood. Just by doing something in a
different outfit, you'll feel a shift in your mindset.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My favorite swimsuit... That reminds me, I got a
new one!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I tried on my swimsuit! What do you think? Does
it suit me?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! All right, I'm gonna take a
dip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week goes for a swim...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Awesome! I set a new personal best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This must be the power of my new swimsuit!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it's good to see you've turned your day
around.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I did! It kind of feels like... I can finally get in a
good run!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty!
choice_data_list: You might want to change your clothes first...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week speeds off before I can stop her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now now, you heard what she said. Why not just
sit back and see how she does?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yay, I did it, Trainer! I set a new personal best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Swimsuits are amazing! Who knew they could give you this much power?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Do you think it'd give me the same boost if I tried doing other things?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What do you think I should do?
choice_data_list: How about you try cleaning up your room?
Let's get some good studying in!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Clean up my room? Got it! I'm gonna drop by my
dorm for a bit!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Fuji. And you must be Spe's trainer. Good
timing. There's a little bit of an odd situation at
hand...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe came back wearing a swimsuit, then she
suddenly started cleaning the room...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, well about that...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...No way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't understand. How... does this even happen?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Suzuka! I'm done tidying things up! Got the
place squeaky clean!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Swimsuits sure are amazing! I wonder if I should
just keep it on...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean... all the time?! Spe, I think that'd
be a little weird... Please wear something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true. She can't go about her daily business in a
swimsuit. Fortunately, I manage to convince her
not to go through with her plan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, studying! Guess that means we're headed to
the library!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now wait just a minute, Special Week! What are
you doing at the library in a swimsuit?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This swimsuit's been giving me a real energy
boost, so I thought I'd try studying for the next
test wearing it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't answer my question in the slightest!
There's no way wearing a swimsuit improves your
scores!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day, the test results come in...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! I got a better score than last
time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Swimsuits sure are amazing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Impossible! This just... cannot be! I can't believe
I've been bested by Special Week.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This can only mean one thing... I too must study in
a swimsuit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea, King! Let's wear swimsuits and
study together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pleasantly surprised by her high test results,
Special Week happily invites her friends along for
a study session.
